data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for client notification with new provider details, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case explicitly states the need for client notifications, yet the evidence does not include any checks or API reads that demonstrate this requirement is being met. This indicates a clear gap in the implementation of the required feature, as no notifications to clients regarding new provider details are documented in the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence of client notification with new provider details.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add notification verification endpoint
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that clients receive notifications with new provider details upon substitution.
